Title: Crowdstrike latest version (7.35.20709.0) updated on machine:- KABDT001, KABDT002, KABRESRIGHT, KABFDBACK
Notes: Connected to the machines (KABDT001, KABDT002, KABRESRIGHT, KABFDBACK) and discovered they were running an older version of CrowdStrike. Attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but the process was unsuccessful.so connect to the system and uninstalled the older version, downloaded, and installed the latest sensor version (7.35.20709.0) on these machines. Verified the update through the portal. Hence, closing this ticket.

Title: Manage engine agent greyout issue for - KABDT001
Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines  KABDT001 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

Title: Server was down from past few days - KSS-HQ-VBR-01.
Notes: The VBR server was down due to space issue from past few days so the backup were failed. Logged into esxi and then troubleshoot the issue on the VBR server to bring the VM up and running. After applying few fix on the VM the issue got resolved. Once the issue was resolved then turned on the VM and start taking the backups. The backup failed again due to space issue. Move some old backup files to one of the desktop as temporary location. After that start the backups again.

Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version (11.5.2600.32.W) updated:- KABDT004 and KABFDRIGHT
Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.5.2600.32.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine (KABDT004 and KABFDRIGHT) from Manage Engine, Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

Title: Cisco Umbrella Agent Syncing Issue with Portal for machines KABDT001,KABDT002,KABDT003,KABDT005
Notes:
Logged into the Cisco Umbrella portal and identified that machines KABDT001,KABDT002,KABDT003,KABDT005
 were experiencing syncing issues with the Cisco Umbrella portal. I then connected to the affected machines and addressed the network connectivity settings. After ensuring proper communication between the agent and the portal, the agent is now successfully syncing and communicating with the Cisco Umbrella cloud, with the correct status and configuration reflected in the portal.
